command.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.bind.des: Bind a permission group to an OceanFS file system's VPC.
command.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.change-p: Replace the permission group bound to an OceanFS file system's VPC.
command.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.list.des: List VPC and permission-group bindings for an OceanFS file system.
command.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.unbind.d: Unbind a permission group from an OceanFS file system's VPC.
command.oceanfs.file-system.create.descr: Create one or more OceanFS file systems.
command.oceanfs.file-system.delete.descr: Delete or unsubscribe from an OceanFS file system.
List OceanFS file systems in a VPC.
command.oceanfs.file-system.list-default: List OceanFS file systems in the tenant's default enterprise project.
command.oceanfs.file-system.list.descrip: List OceanFS file systems in a region.
command.oceanfs.file-system.renew.descri: Renew a subscription OceanFS file system.
command.oceanfs.file-system.resize.descr: Increase an OceanFS file system's capacity.
command.oceanfs.file-system.show-by-name: Retrieve an OceanFS file system by name.
command.oceanfs.file-system.show.descrip: Retrieve an OceanFS file system by ID.
command.oceanfs.mounted-client.list.desc: List active NFS clients mounted to an OceanFS file system.
command.oceanfs.permission-group.list.de: List OceanFS permission groups or retrieve one permission group.
command.oceanfs.permission-rule.list.des: List OceanFS permission-group rules or retrieve one rule.
command.oceanfs.pricing.quote-create.des: Quote one or more new OceanFS file systems.
command.oceanfs.replication.create.descr: Create an OceanFS cross-region replication configuration.
command.oceanfs.replication.delete.descr: Delete an OceanFS cross-region replication configuration.
command.oceanfs.replication.list.descrip: List OceanFS replication configurations for a file system.
command.oceanfs.replication.set-protecti: Set overwrite protection for an OceanFS replication target.
command.oceanfs.storage-type.list.descri: List OceanFS storage types and availability-zone support in a region.
command.oceanfs.subdirectory.create.desc: Create a subdirectory in an OceanFS file system.
command.oceanfs.subdirectory.delete.desc: Delete an OceanFS subdirectory and its descendants.
name: OceanFS
parameter.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.bind.i: Whether to create a free VPC endpoint for this binding; subnet ID is required when true.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.bind.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.bind.s: Subnet ID used to allocate the VPC endpoint address when VPCE creation is enabled.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.bind.v: VPC ID associated with the OceanFS file system.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.change: Region ID used to scope the request.
VPC ID associated with the OceanFS file system.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.list.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system-vpc.unbind: Region ID used to scope the request.
VPC ID associated with the OceanFS file system.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.az_: Availability-zone name for the file system; omit it in a single-AZ region.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.cli: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.cyc: Subscription cycle count: 1-3 for yearly billing or 1-36 for monthly billing.
Subscription cycle type: year or month.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.is_: Whether OceanFS creates a free VPC endpoint for the file-system binding.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.lab: JSON array of up to ten labels to bind to each created file system.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.on_: Whether the new file systems use on-demand billing; default is true. Cycle type and count are required when false.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.ord: Number of identically configured file systems to create, from 1 to 10; default is 1.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.pro: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.sfs: OceanFS file-system name containing 2-255 letters, digits, or hyphens; it must start with a letter and cannot end with a hyphen.
File-system protocol: nfs for Linux or cifs for Windows.
File-system capacity from 100 to 1048576 GB, subject to the tenant's remaining quota.
OceanFS storage type: massive for capacity storage or massive_perf for performance storage.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.sub: Subnet ID used to allocate the VPC endpoint address when VPCE creation is enabled.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.create.vpc: VPC ID to bind to the new file system.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.delete.cli: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.delete.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.list-by-vp: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Region ID used to scope the request.
VPC ID associated with the OceanFS file system.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.list-defau: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.list.page_: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.list.proje: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.list.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.rename.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.rename.sfs: OceanFS file-system name containing 2-255 letters, digits, or hyphens; it must start with a letter and cannot end with a hyphen.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.renew.clie: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.renew.cycl: Subscription cycle count: 1-3 for yearly billing or 1-36 for monthly billing.
Subscription cycle type: year or month.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.renew.regi: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.resize.cli: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.resize.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.resize.sfs: New file-system capacity in GB; OceanFS supports expansion only, subject to tenant and per-file-system quotas.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.show-by-na: Region ID used to scope the request.
OceanFS file-system name containing 2-255 letters, digits, or hyphens; it must start with a letter and cannot end with a hyphen.
parameter.oceanfs.file-system.show.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.mounted-client.list.ip: One client IP address used for exact matching, or a partial address used for fuzzy matching.
parameter.oceanfs.mounted-client.list.pa: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.oceanfs.mounted-client.list.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.permission-group.creat: Permission-group network type; only private_network is supported.
Permission-group description containing at most 128 Chinese or English characters.
Permission-group name containing 2-63 letters, digits, or hyphens; it must start with a letter and cannot end with a hyphen.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.permission-group.delet: Region ID used to scope the request.
Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.permission-group.updat: Updated permission-group description of at most 128 characters; supply it or a name.
Updated permission-group name containing 2-63 letters, digits, or hyphens; supply it or a description.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.permission-rule.create: IPv4 or IPv6 host or network authorised by the permission rule; use * to allow every address.
Unique rule priority from 1 to 400, where 1 is the highest priority.
Region ID used to scope the request.
Access mode: rw for read-write access or ro for read-only access.
NFS user mapping: no_root_squash, all_squash, or root_squash.
parameter.oceanfs.permission-rule.delete: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.permission-rule.list.p: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
Permission-group FUID filter; supply it or a permission-rule FUID.
Permission-rule FUID filter; supply it or a permission-group FUID.
parameter.oceanfs.permission-rule.list.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.permission-rule.update: IPv4 or IPv6 host or network authorised by the permission rule; use * to allow every address.
Unique rule priority from 1 to 400, where 1 is the highest priority.
Region ID used to scope the request.
Access mode: rw for read-write access or ro for read-only access.
NFS user mapping: no_root_squash, all_squash, or root_squash.
parameter.oceanfs.pricing.quote-create.c: Subscription cycle count: 1-3 for yearly billing or 1-36 for monthly billing.
Subscription cycle type: year or month.
parameter.oceanfs.pricing.quote-create.o: Whether the quoted file systems use on-demand billing; default is true. Cycle type and count are required when false.
Number of file systems included in the quote, from 1 to 200.
parameter.oceanfs.pricing.quote-create.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.pricing.quote-create.s: OceanFS storage type: massive for capacity storage or massive_perf for performance storage.
Subscription cycle count: 1-3 for yearly billing or 1-36 for monthly billing.
Subscription cycle type: year or month.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.pricing.quote-resize.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.pricing.quote-resize.s: Target expanded file-system capacity in GB used for the price quote.
parameter.oceanfs.replication.create.des: Region ID containing the destination file system.
parameter.oceanfs.replication.create.sou: Region ID containing the source file system.
parameter.oceanfs.replication.delete.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.replication.list.page_: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.oceanfs.replication.list.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.replication.set-protec: Whether overwrite protection is enabled on the replication target; set false before creating replication.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.storage-type.list.page: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.
Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.
parameter.oceanfs.storage-type.list.regi: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.subdirectory.create.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.subdirectory.create.su: Directory owner group ID from 0 to 4294967294; default is 0.
Three-digit directory permission mode with each digit from 0 to 7; default is 755.
Absolute OceanFS-internal directory path beginning with /, with at most 1,000 levels and 4,000 bytes.
Directory owner user ID from 0 to 4294967294; default is 0.
parameter.oceanfs.subdirectory.delete.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.subdirectory.delete.su: Absolute OceanFS-internal directory path beginning with /, with at most 1,000 levels and 4,000 bytes.
parameter.oceanfs.subdirectory.show.regi: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.oceanfs.subdirectory.show.subd: Absolute OceanFS-internal directory path beginning with /, with at most 1,000 levels and 4,000 bytes.
